title: Prometheus Time Series Collection and Processing Server
elements_observed: Header/navbar with logo, primary nav links (Query highlighted in blue subtle), Alerts, Status dropdown caret
Theme toggle button (top-right, dark-grey ghost icon)
Large query input with left caret prompt glyph (>_)
Three-dot kebab menu on right of query input
Tab row: Table (active with blue underline), Graph, Explain — icons + label
Evaluation time pagination (prev/next caret with placeholder text 'Evaluation time')
Empty state text: 'No data queried yet' (plain black sans)
Secondary 'Add query' button (filled-blue-tint variant with + icon)
interactive_states_observed: Status dropdown expanded with two sections: 'Monitoring status' (Target health, Rule health, Service discovery) and 'Server status' (Runtime & build information, TSDB status, Command-line flags, Configuration, Alertmanager discovery)
Every dropdown item has a leading icon; section headings rendered in small grey uppercase-ish sans
